notice: Every vendor, request, amount, site, and policy in this demonstration is fictional and synthetic.

requests.title: Three-site delivery window change
requests.text: Vendor: Brightline Supply Co.; Type: delivery window change; Sites: 3; Notice: 72 hours; Cost impact: $0; Original window: Tuesday 08:00-11:00; Requested window: Friday 13:00-16:00; Approval owner: Procurement operations manager; Reason: carrier capacity changed.

requests.title: Software renewal seat mismatch
requests.text: Vendor: Mosaic Software Works; Type: invoice renewal exception; Sites: 1; Notice: 12 hours; Cost impact: $4,800; Prior seats: 52; Requested seats: 64; Purchase order: missing; Approval owner: Finance lead; Reason: vendor invoice differs from the approved renewal plan.

requests.title: Holiday cleaning coverage exception
requests.text: Vendor: Cedar House Services; Type: service coverage exception; Sites: missing; Notice: 96 hours; Cost impact: $900; Coverage owner: missing; Requested window: holiday weekend; Approval owner: Facilities manager; Reason: temporary staffing shortage.
